hooks.command:
printf '%s
' '--- INTENT (clain-me) ---'; cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/INTENT.md" 2>/dev/null || echo '(INTENT.md missing — create it before non-trivial work)'; printf '
--- Active specs ---
'; if ls "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/specs/"[0-9]*.md >/dev/null 2>&1; then for f in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/specs/"[0-9]*.md; do awk '/^---$/{c++;next} c==1{print FILENAME": "$0; if($0 ~ /^status:/) exit}' "$f"; done; else echo '(no specs yet — write one in specs/ before non-trivial work)'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["tool_input"].get("command",""))' 2>/dev/null); case "$cmd" in *"rm -rf"*|*"rm -fr"*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Destructive rm detected. Per INTENT goal 2 (deliberate cleanup), confirm there is an accepted spec authorising this deletion."}}';; esac
